enchantment.ad_astra_giselle_addon.acid_:
Don't damage from acid rain in Ad Astra dimensions
Uses energy or durability
enchantment.ad_astra_giselle_addon.gravi:
Normalize gravity like overworld in Ad Astra dimensions
Uses energy or durability

Can breath in Ad Astra dimensions
Require 'Oxygen Can' in inventory

Don't set fire to player in Ad Astra dimensions

enchantment.alexscaves.arrow_inducting.d: Resistor Shield transforms any deflected arrows into seeking arrows
enchantment.alexscaves.astral_transferri: Mobs possessed by the Totem of Possession can swap possessed status with other, healthier mobs they fight

enchantment.alexscaves.bouncing_bolt.des: Sea Staff water bolt can bounce to a second target after a direct hit

enchantment.alexscaves.tsunami.desc: Ortholance launch summons a single, gigantic wave

enchantment.biomancy.anesthetic.desc: Prevents the Damage & Aggro caused by injecting mobs with the Injector. Mobs won't know who attacked them, and animals won't panic anymore.
enchantment.biomancy.despoil.desc: When killing something with a weapon that has this enchantment, they will drop additional special loot.
enchantment.biomancy.parasitic_metabolis: When any held or equipped living item is damaged, consumes every 1.5 seconds nutrition from a healthy players food bar to restore nutrients.
enchantment.biomancy.self_feeding.desc: When any held or equipped living item is damaged, consumes every 1.5 seconds nutrients from the players hotbar.
Improves the quality and success of surgeries or extraction of essences from mobs.
enchantment.celestisynth.pulsation.desc: Has a chance of causing an additional on-hit pulse that applies knockback and extra damage
enchantment.cofh_core.holding.desc: Increases the storage capacity of certain items.
enchantment.combatroll.acrobat.desc: Reduces the cooldown time between your rolls
enchantment.combatroll.longfooted.desc: Increases the distance of your rolls
enchantment.create.potato_recovery.desc: Potato Cannon projectiles have a chance to be reused.
enchantment.darkerdepths.quick_dash.desc: Reduces the Stiletto's dash cooldown, allowing more frequent dashes.
enchantment.darkerdepths.swift_strike.de: When hitting an entity with a Stiletto during its active time window, removes the weapon's cooldown, allowing for rapid successive strikes.
enchantment.deeperdarker.catalysis.desc: Killing mobs will spread sculk nearby.
enchantment.deeperdarker.sculk_smite.des: Increases damage to sculk based mobs.
enchantment.diversity.backup_blast_prote: Reduces a small amount of the damage from explosions and explosion knockback.

enchantment.diversity.backup_projectile_: Reduces a small amount of the damage from projectiles such as arrows and fire balls.
Reduces a small amount of the damage from most sources.
enchantment.diversity.refill.desc: Grants the bundle the ability to automatically refill items from the user's inventory when they run out while placing.
enchantment.diversity.selective_vacuum.d: Bundle automatically sucks newly picked-up items, but only those already inside.
enchantment.diversity.vacuum.desc: Bundle automatically sucks newly picked-up items.
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.amph: Pet cannot dry out or drown on land or in water, increases speed in water, pet will not float but swim quickly
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.blaz: Pet will be protected from damage by 2 blazing bars per level, which knockback and set attackers on fire.
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.blig: Plants will wither and die around the pet.
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.bubb: Pet attacks trap mob inside giant bubble that floats upwards
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.chai: Summons a lightning bolt that chains from and damages mobs each time a pet attacks, level increases how many mobs can be hit by lightning
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.char: Pet lowers trade prices for its owner, level increases the bargain
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.defl: Pet is protected by a ghostly shield which deflects projectile attacks
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.defu: Pet can nullify explosion damage to terrain and other mobs, level increases range
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.disc: Pet is followed by a floating jukebox that can play music discs
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.fire: Grants pet immunity to fire and lava damage
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.fros: Pet attacks now slows mobs shortly and deals freezing damage
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.glut: Pet can eat any food item, regardless of dietary restrictions
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.heal: Pet will ocassionally heal owner and other pets around it, level determines strength of healing effect.
Increases pet's max health by 10 for each level
Any damage done to pet is transferred to its owner
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.herd: Pet can be followed by wild animals, level increases maximum amount of followers
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.imma: Pet appears and behaves as a baby version of itself, with reduced attack damage.
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.immu: Each level makes pet immune for an additional second after attack
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.infa: Pet can naturally make any nearby monster hostile to it
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.inti: Pet can scare away hostile mobs with its fearsome appearance, level determines range and frequency of effect
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.link: Pet can pick up items and teleport them to owner's inventory
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.magn: Pet aided by ghostly magnet that pulls targeted mobs towards it
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.muff: Pet will be silent and not emit vibrations when moving.
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.ore_: Pet can sniff out ore blocks and alert its owner, level determines distance, amount and frequency of ore detection
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.pois: Grants pet immunity to poison effect
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.psyc: Pet summons a wall of psychic energy during combat to provide cover, level determines size of wall and length of the effect
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.reju: When injured, pet may absorb experience orbs to heal itself.
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.shad: Pet uses dark magic to attack targets with shadowy hands, level increases speed and amount of hands
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.teth: Pet will teleport with its owner, even across dimensions.
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.tota: When below 2 health, pet enters a recall orb and is protected until released by its owner
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.unde: Pet returns as a hostile, zombie pet after death
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.vamp: Pet heals amount of damage done, level increases percentage of dealt damage healed
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.void: Pet is protected from falling off cliffs or into void by a large cloud that lifts it up and returns it to its owner
enchantment.domesticationinnovation.warp: Pet will randomly teleport targeted mobs away from it
enchantment.dungeonnowloading.break_prot: Upon item breaking, turns into repairable Item Scraps

enchantment.dungeonsdelight.serrated_str: Cleavers inflict serrated onto struck entities causing protection bypassing damage.

enchantment.minecraft.vanishing_curse.de: Destroys the cursed item if you die with it in your inventory.

Responsible hunting can provide you with extra ingredients!!!
But be careful about choosing your target...
enchantment.netherexp.artemis.desc: Increases the range of projectiles for many ranged weapons.

Replaces explosive projectiles with safe rockets that damage entities without destroying terrain

enchantment.the_bumblezone.comb_cutter.d:
Mines combs, hives, nest, and wax blocks faster. 
Doubles output of any BeeNest or BeeHive blocks.
enchantment.the_bumblezone.hive_lifeline: Any attack damage to player will be transferred to a nearby bee instead! The enchanted armor item gets put on a short cooldown on damage transfer.

Chance to inflict Paralyzed on non-undead mob and non-iron/snow golems. 
Higher health mobs decreases paralysis chance.
enchantment.the_bumblezone.potent_poison:
Inflict poison when it hits a non-undead mob. 
Higher level increase duration and poison level.

enchantment.tonsofenchants.xp_sword_mast: §bAny attacked entity has a chance to drop XP.
enchantment.too_many_bows.ricochet.desc: Allows arrows to ricochet off more surfaces for the Astral Bound Bow only.
enchantment.too_many_bows.spectral.desc: Allows arrows to pass through additional obstacles.
enchantment.twilightforest.chill_aura.de: Adds a chance for the attacker to gain the frosted effect after hitting the wearer.
enchantment.twilightforest.destruction.d: Allows the Block and Chain to break blocks with a higher mining tier.
enchantment.twilightforest.fire_react.de: Adds a chance for the attacker to be set on fire after hitting the wearer.
enchantment.undergarden.longevity.desc: Increases max durability of the Slingshot.
enchantment.undergarden.ricochet.desc: Projectiles fired by the Slingshot will bounce off block surfaces.
enchantment.undergarden.self_sling.desc: Instead of firing ammo, the Slingshot fires you. Requires you to be on the ground.
enchantment.weapon.bewitchedsword.desc: Grants lifesteal on hit and drains hunger when you move
enchantment.weapon.iaidou.desc: Adds damage boost on parry and deals extra damage from special attack
